actions.label: 󰤨 Wi-Fi
actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && nmcli radio wifi on || nmcli radio wifi off'
actions.update-command: sh -c '[[ $(nmcli radio wifi) == "enabled" ]] && echo true || echo false'

actions.label: 󰂯 Bluetooth
actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && bluetoothctl power on || bluetoothctl power off'
actions.update-command: sh -c 'bluetoothctl show | grep -q "Powered: yes" && echo true || echo false'

actions.label: 󰈀 Ethernet
actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && nmcli networking on || nmcli networking off'
actions.update-command: sh -c '[[ $(nmcli networking connectivity) != "none" ]] && echo true || echo false'

actions.label: 󰓅 Boost
actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && sudo tlp ac || sudo tlp bat'
actions.update-command: sh -c 'tlp-stat -s | grep -q "Mode.*=.*AC" && echo true || echo false'

actions.label: 󰖂 VPN
actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && warp-cli connect || warp-cli disconnect'
actions.update-command: sh -c 'warp-cli status | grep -q "Connected" && echo true || echo false'

actions.label:  Terminal
actions.command: sh -c 'if command -v kitty >/dev/null 2>&1; then kitty -c $L_PATH/config/kitty.conf; elif command -v wezterm >/dev/null 2>&1; then wezterm; fi'
